telemetry.raw_response_head:
```python
"""
Pytest tests for patient search functionality.
Requirement: A clinician shall search patients by name, MRN, or DOB;
             only patients in their care shall be returned.
"""

import pytest
from datetime import date
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Adjust these imports to match your actual application structure
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
from app.services.patient_service import PatientSearchService
from app.models.patient import Patient
from app.models.clinician import Clinician
from app.exceptions import (
    InvalidSearchQueryError,
    UnauthorizedAccessError,
    SearchServiceUnavailableError,
)

# ===========================================================================
# FIXTURES
# ===========================================================================

@pytest.fixture
def clinician_a():
    """Clinician who owns a specific set of patients."""
    return Clinician(id="CLIN-001", name="Dr. Alice Smith", department="Cardiology")


@pytest.fixture
def clinician_b():
    """Clinician with a different, non-overlapping patient panel."""
    return Clinician(id="CLIN-002", name="Dr. Bob Jones", department="Neurology")


@pytest.fixture
def patients_for_clinician_a():
    """Patients assigned to clinician_a."""
    return [
        Patient(
            id="PAT-101",
            mrn="MRN100001",
            first_name="John",
            last_name="Doe",
            dob=date(1980, 6, 15),
            clinician_id="CLIN-001",
        ),
        Patient(
            id="PAT-102",
            mrn="MRN100002",
            first_name="Jane",
            last_name="Doe",
            dob=date(1975, 3, 22),
            clinician_id="CLIN-001",
        ),
        Patient(
            id="PAT-103",
            mrn="MRN100003",
            first_name="Alice",
            last_name="Nguyen",
            dob=date(1990, 11, 8),
            clinician_id="CLIN-001",
        ),
    ]


@pytest.fixture
def patients_for_clinician_b():
    """Patients assigned to clinician_b (should never appear in clinician_a searches)."""
    return [
        Patient(
            id="PAT-201",
            mrn="MRN200001",
            first_name="Robert",
            last_name="Brown",
            dob=date(1965, 7, 30),
            clinician_id="CLIN-002",
        ),
        Patient(
            id="PAT-202",
            mrn="MRN200002",
            first_name="Jane",          # Same first name as PAT-102
            last_name="Brown",
            dob=date(1975, 3, 22),      # Same DOB as PAT-102
            clinician_id="CLIN-002",
        ),
    ]


@pytest.fixture
def patient_repository(patients_for_clinician_a, patients_for_clinician_b):
    """
    Mock repository that simulates the data store.
    Returns only patients whose clinician_id matches the requesting clinician.
    """
    all_patients = patients_for_clinician_a + patients_for_clinician_b

    repo = MagicMock()

    def _search(clinician_id, **kwargs):
        panel = [p for p in all_patients if p.clinician_id == clinician_id]
        results = panel

        if "name" in kwargs:
            term = kwargs["name"].lower()
            results = [
                p for p in results
                if term in p.first_name.lower() or term in p.last_name.lower()
            ]
        if "mrn" in kwargs:
            results = [p for p in results if p.mrn == kwargs["mrn"]]
        if "dob" in kwargs:
            results = [p for p in results if p.dob == kwargs["dob"]]

        return results

    repo.search.side_effect = _search
    return repo


@pytest.fixture
def search_service(patient_repository):
    """PatientSearchService wired with the mock repository."""
    return PatientSearchService(repository=patient_repository)
